name_en: M69029💕【Special Introduction】👉Overseas Exclusive (Counter Goods)👍To celebrate the brand's precious heritage, Louis Vuitton Men's Artistic Director Virgil Abloh crafted this Brazza wallet using the brand's iconic materials: a combination of Monogram coated canvas and smooth natural calfskin. This wallet is highly functional with many compartments to hold all necessities of modern daily life. Dimensions: 10.0 x 19.0 x 2.0 cm ~
